subject: [PATCH v10 13/15] userfaultfd: add UFFDIO_SET_MODE for runtime sync/async toggle

2026-07-08.patch_summary: This patch adds a new ioctl, UFFDIO_SET_MODE, which allows a VMM to toggle between sync and async RWP modes at runtime without re-registering the userfaultfd. The ioctl takes an enable/disable bitmask of UFFD_FEATURE_* flags, with only UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC being toggleable today. When switching to async mode, pending sync waiters are woken so they retry and auto-resolve under the new mode. This allows for dynamic switching between modes, enabling scenarios such as working set scanning in async mode followed by fault interception during page eviction in sync mode.
